name: primary lung malignancy
description: Primary lung malignancy is a malignant neoplasm arising from the lung parenchyma or bronchial tree, most commonly non-small cell carcinoma, presenting as a mass, nodule, or infiltrate on imaging.

attributes.name: presence
attributes.description: Presence or absence of primary lung malignancy

values.name: indeterminate
values.description: Presence of primary lung malignancy cannot be determined

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The maximum diameter of the primary lung malignancy in millimeters

attributes.name: location
attributes.description: The lobar location of the primary lung malignancy

values.name: right upper lobe
values.description: Located in the right upper lobe

values.name: right middle lobe
values.description: Located in the right middle lobe

values.name: right lower lobe
values.description: Located in the right lower lobe

values.name: left upper lobe
values.description: Located in the left upper lobe

values.name: left lower lobe
values.description: Located in the left lower lobe
